/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared  -o cpu.emulation.emulation_profile.so CMakeFiles/cpu.emulation.emulation_profile.dir/emulation.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kunq/smartnic_infra_sim/gvsoc/smartnic_rdma/host_centric_baseline/build/core_build/build/core/engine ../../../engine/libpulpvp-profile.so -lz -lpthread -ldl
